name: Easy Fish Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice, white wine, and soy sauce in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Place fish on top of the marinade.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 45 minutes.
4. Do not add oil or butter when cooking.
5. To prevent drying out, place approximately 3/4 inch of water at the bottom of the broiling pan before heating.
